close_reason: Moved test imports to module top, used disambiguating aliases
description:
Pedantic clippy flags use statements inside test functions (lib.rs:382, 422, 465 etc.) — 'adding items after statements is confusing, since items exist from the start of the scope'.

Fix: hoist the test-only use ed25519_dalek::pkcs8::DecodePublicKey / use ed25519_dalek::Verifier etc. to the top of the tests module, outside individual #[test] fns.

Style-only; no functional change.
title: Test imports inside #[tokio::test] bodies trigger clippy::items_after_statements
